calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel and or Self-represented Plaintiff for failure to file Proof of Service; obtain answer or enter default or dismiss Defendant Officer Greg Latus and Does 1 to 6 as to First Amended Complaint is heard this day. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that the balance of this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)
